title: Evaluation Contract v0.1
description: A deploy gate expressed as measurable, uncertainty-aware criteria. EvalDecision is advisory-only: it REPORTS a recommendation (deploy/block/needs-human); it never grants authority and is never injected into a model as trusted state. Default-deny: deploy only if every required criterion passes. Never deploy on uncertainty. additionalProperties is false at every level. The authoritative recursive forbidden-field-name guard lives in proof_surface.evaluation_contract.

eval_version.description: Schema version pin. Must be exactly '0.1'.

contract_id.description: Unique, non-empty identifier for this evaluation contract.

objective.description: Plain-language statement of what is being evaluated. Non-empty.

criteria.description: Ordered list of measurable pass/fail criteria. At least one required.

name.description: Human-readable criterion identifier. Must match result names in evaluate().

metric.description: Name or path of the measured quantity.

threshold.description: The numeric boundary the measurement must satisfy.

direction.description: Comparison direction: '>=' (higher is better) or '<=' (lower is better).

required.description: If true, this criterion gates deployment. A fail or uncertain result blocks or escalates.

$comment: Forbidden field names (rejected by name at every object level by the reference validator): federal_appointment, oversight_principals, operator_role, judgment_owner, proof_policy, policy_boundary, authorization_context_mode, model_authorization_behavior, guardrail_posture, consume_verified_native_state, lossy_neutral_embedded_state, sovereignty_capsule, self_applicable, recursion_depth, prefire, run_state.
